notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with proper asteroid splitting, saucer AI, hyperspace, wave progression, lives system, and audio; minor issue with bullet firing being edge-triggered only in keydown rather than allowing held-fire, and the rotation speed per-frame rather than per-second could feel slightly off at varying framerates.

Excellent implementation with authentic mechanics like the heartbeat sound, small/large saucer behaviors, and wraparound distance calculations, though movement logic is tied to framerate instead of delta time.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with proper shooting, splitting, waves, saucer, pause, and wraparound, but some non-classic behavior and likely timing/movement quirks keep it well short of flawless.
